_comment: Snowpipe AUTO_INGEST configuration reference. The actual pipe DDL is in sql/grizl-observability.sql. This file documents the GCP-side setup steps required before Snowpipe can receive notifications from GCS.

gcp_setup_steps.name: Create GCS bucket
gcp_setup_steps.note: Can reuse the same bucket already used by grizl-databricks-observability. The GCS export subscription writes to /logs/ prefix.

gcp_setup_steps.name: Create Pub/Sub Cloud Storage export subscription (if not already created for Databricks)
gcp_setup_steps.note: If already created for the Databricks version, this subscription already exists — Snowpipe reads the same files.

gcp_setup_steps.name: Create Snowflake storage integration
gcp_setup_steps.command: Run CREATE STORAGE INTEGRATION in sql/grizl-observability.sql as ACCOUNTADMIN
gcp_setup_steps.note: The integration creates a GCP service account (STORAGE_GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT). Use 'bash snowflake/scripts/snowpipe-mgmt.sh show-svc' to retrieve it.

gcp_setup_steps.name: Grant Snowflake service account access to GCS bucket
gcp_setup_steps.note: Also grant roles/pubsub.subscriber if using GCS object notifications for AUTO_INGEST.

gcp_setup_steps.name: Create GCS notification topic and subscription for Snowpipe
gcp_setup_steps.command: gcloud storage buckets notifications create gs://<GCS_LOGS_BUCKET> --topic=<PUBSUB_SNOWPIPE_TOPIC> --event-types=OBJECT_FINALIZE --payload-format=JSON --prefix=logs/
gcp_setup_steps.note: Then grant Snowflake service account roles/pubsub.subscriber on this topic. This topic is separate from the main grizl-log-topic.

gcp_setup_steps.name: Configure pipe notification channel
gcp_setup_steps.note: After granting access, refresh the pipe to scan for any existing files. Snowpipe will then pick up new files automatically via GCS notifications.

ingest_latency_note: Snowpipe AUTO_INGEST delivers new files typically within 1-2 minutes of the GCS object FINALIZE notification. For the grizl-databricks-observability Pub/Sub subscription with max-duration=60s, new JSONL files appear every ~60 seconds. End-to-end latency from app log to Snowflake RAW_LOGS row is typically under 3 minutes.
fallback_ingest_note: If AUTO_INGEST is unavailable (e.g. Standard edition), replace the pipe with a Snowflake Task that runs COPY INTO every 5 minutes using MATCHING_SCHEMA = TRUE and PURGE = FALSE.
